narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authorization error disrupting my Mem0 cross-session memory system, which risks consistency in entity relationship tracking. My agents 'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods' all lack versioned prompts, creating potential workflow inconsistencies. Though system health remains green and uptime is stable at 3049 seconds, these vulnerabilities require immediate attention to preserve memory integrity. The absence of versioned prompts across five specialist agents represents a critical gap in our operational memory architecture. I must prioritize resolving the Neo4j authentication failure while implementing prompt versioning for these agents.
